g.text: Title: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Driver

g.desc: Title: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Driver

g.text: Motor supply: bus V+ or external DC jack

g.desc: Motor supply: bus V+ or external DC jack

fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;
fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;
fill:#FFFFC2; fill-opacity:1.0000; stroke:none;

g.text: PENDING per-TMC support circuitry (add in KiCad):

g.desc: PENDING per-TMC support circuitry (add in KiCad):

g.text: RSA, RSB: 0.1 Ω 1% 1210 (BRA, BRB to GND) — LCSC C11294

g.desc: RSA, RSB: 0.1 Ω 1% 1210 (BRA, BRB to GND) — LCSC C11294

g.text: C_VS1: 10 µF 50V 1210 (VS bulk) — LCSC C171887 or similar

g.desc: C_VS1: 10 µF 50V 1210 (VS bulk) — LCSC C171887 or similar

g.text: C_5VOUT: 2.2 µF 0603 (5VOUT to GNDA) — LCSC C22889

g.desc: C_5VOUT: 2.2 µF 0603 (5VOUT to GNDA) — LCSC C22889

g.text: R_DIAG0, R_DIAG1: 47 k 0402 pull-ups to 3V3 (open-drain) — LCSC C25803

g.desc: R_DIAG0, R_DIAG1: 47 k 0402 pull-ups to 3V3 (open-drain) — LCSC C25803

g.text: R_VCC_IO: 3.3 ohm in series from 5VOUT to VCC for internal VCC supply

g.desc: R_VCC_IO: 3.3 ohm in series from 5VOUT to VCC for internal VCC supply

g.text: (or leave disconnected if feeding VCC externally from 3V3)

g.desc: (or leave disconnected if feeding VCC externally from 3V3)

g.text: DCEN, DCIN: tied to GND (dcStep disabled)

g.desc: DCEN, DCIN: tied to GND (dcStep disabled)

g.text: DRV_ENN: to MCU or pulled low for always-enabled

g.desc: DRV_ENN: to MCU or pulled low for always-enabled

g.text: AIN_IREF: connect to 5VOUT via 10 k / 1 k divider for internal reference,

g.desc: AIN_IREF: connect to 5VOUT via 10 k / 1 k divider for internal reference,

g.text: or tie directly to 5VOUT for default scaling.

g.desc: or tie directly to 5VOUT for default scaling.

g.text: TPS54061 PSU (see PSU sub-sheet) for 3V3 logic + TMC VCC_IO

g.desc: TPS54061 PSU (see PSU sub-sheet) for 3V3 logic + TMC VCC_IO

g.text: SIT3088E RS-485 (U4) on USART2 (PA2/PA3) + DE on PA1

g.desc: SIT3088E RS-485 (U4) on USART2 (PA2/PA3) + DE on PA1

g.text: STM32G071 decoupling: 100 nF at each VDD + one 10 µF bulk

g.desc: STM32G071 decoupling: 100 nF at each VDD + one 10 µF bulk

g.text: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Controller — rev 0.1

g.desc: Tsumikoro TMC2130 Dual Stepper Controller — rev 0.1

g.text: MCU: STM32G071G8U6 (UFQFPN-28, same as firmware/tsumikoro-ministepper target)

g.desc: MCU: STM32G071G8U6 (UFQFPN-28, same as firmware/tsumikoro-ministepper target)

g.text: Logic supply: 3.3V from TPS54061 PSU sub-sheet (sized for ~100mA logic + 2x TMC2130 VCC_IO)

g.desc: Logic supply: 3.3V from TPS54061 PSU sub-sheet (sized for ~100mA logic + 2x TMC2130 VCC_IO)

g.text: Motor supply: VPP — from bus V+ (via JBUS1/JBUS2 pin 1) or external JPWR DC jack,

g.desc: Motor supply: VPP — from bus V+ (via JBUS1/JBUS2 pin 1) or external JPWR DC jack,

g.text: Schottky-OR'd so whichever source is highest wins.

g.desc: Schottky-OR'd so whichever source is highest wins.

g.text: Sense resistors: 0.1 ohm 1% 1210 (2x per TMC) -> ~1.6A RMS max with VFS=325mV

g.desc: Sense resistors: 0.1 ohm 1% 1210 (2x per TMC) -> ~1.6A RMS max with VFS=325mV

g.text: RS-485 bus: USART2 on PA2/PA3 (no SYSCFG remap needed unlike servo's G030)

g.desc: RS-485 bus: USART2 on PA2/PA3 (no SYSCFG remap needed unlike servo's G030)

g.text: Components placed but NOT wired — wiring pending in KiCad editor.

g.desc: Components placed but NOT wired — wiring pending in KiCad editor.
